data.title: Ex-UFC fighter Ben Askren promotes crypto scam after nearly dying; Sahil Arora's meme coin causes losses for investors.
data.description: Sahil Arora, known for creating celebrity meme coins, has taken credit for the promotion of a Solana-based meme coin by Askren, which resulted in losses for investors.

data.title: Despite July's 100% surge, HBAR's price drops to $0.25 with bullish indicators post 3.9% pullback from resistance levels.
data.description: Following a surge of over 100% in July, HBAR is currently trading at $0.25. Despite a recent 3.9% pullback from resistance levels, technical indicators suggest bullish momentum for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: McPherson College in Kansas unveils 1972 Ferrari 365 GTB/4 Daytona hanging from ceiling in new student center, boasting 55,000 sq ft building.
data.description: In McPherson, Kansas, McPherson College unveiled its Campus Commons student center through a ribbon-cutting ceremony. The striking centerpiece of the 55,000-square-foot building is a rare 1972 Ferrari 365 GTB/4 Daytona, lifted to the atrium ceiling. The new center in McPherson, KS offers dining choices, a coffee shop, campus store, and areas for student collaboration and lounging.
Friday FX Options Expiries

data.title: MedComms Experts acquires NexGen Healthcare Communications to enhance strategic communications platform for global expansion.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, MedComms Experts ("MCE"), a worldwide medical communications agency supported by The Brydon Group, revealed its acquisition of NexGen Healthcare Communications ("NexGen"). NexGen, a UK-based agency known for integrated solutions, will now join MCE's network. This move signifies a significant development in the industry, consolidating two leading agencies.
President Macron: We will recognize a Palestinian state
House of Representatives Chinese Select Committee subpoenas JPMorgan, BofA CEOs for backing Chinese military giant. They must comply by August 8th – statement. $BAC $JPM

data.title: Sarepta stock plunges as FDA demands more testing for gene therapy Elevidys, raising concerns about dangerous precedent.
data.description: Sarepta's shares experienced a significant decrease on Thursday due to news that the FDA will mandate further clinical trials to confirm the safety of Elevidys. This setback could have alarming implications for gene therapies, as the company faces challenges in gaining regulatory approval. The stock market responded to this development, underscoring the importance of thorough testing in ensuring the safety and efficacy of new treatments.

data.title: Over 75% front-line hospitality workers earn under $44,000 while hospitality degree holders make the average.
data.description: A recent study conducted by OysterLink in New York analyzed labor market outcomes for graduates in the hospitality industry by comparing industry pay data from 2020 to 2024. The study found that over 75% of front-line hospitality workers earn salaries lower than the median early-career income of $44,000. This indicates a prevalent trend of relatively low wages among employees in the hospitality sector.
Dreamland Limited has completed its IPO, raising $50 million.

data.title: Dogwifhat (WIF) dips to $1.09 from $1.30, down 7.26%, but bullish trend holds strong with whale accumulation.
data.description: Following a peak at $1.30, the price of WIF has dropped by 7.26% to $1.09. However, despite this decrease, technical indicators indicate that there is still bullish momentum in place. The strong accumulation of whales further solidifies this sentiment.

data.title: Senate will likely pass House's crypto market structure bill; pursuing stablecoin law after. Tom Emmer's statement.
data.description: The Senate is developing a new crypto market structure bill in addition to successfully passing stablecoin legislation.

data.title: Cryptocurrency markets recover, with Ethereum leading. Bitcoin at $119,157.24, Ethereum at $3,738.63. Bitcoin's large transaction down 13.4%, daily active addresses up 6.2%. 229,386 traders liquidated in past 24 hours for $666.60 million.
data.description: The cryptocurrency market is showing signs of recovery on Thursday, with Ethereum leading the way for altcoins. Current prices are as follows: Bitcoin (BTC) is at $119,157.24, Ethereum (ETH) at $3,738.63, Solana (SOL) at $189.07, XRP at $3.23, Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.2399, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.00001388. Key statistics reveal that Bitcoin's large transactions have decreased by 13.4%, while daily active addresses have grown by 6.2%. Exchange netflows are down by 90.8%, and transactions over $100,000 have increased from 10,510 to 11,053. Data from Coinglass indicates that 229,386 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours, resulting in losses totaling $666.60 million. Among the top losers in the past day are Pump.fun (PUMP), Fartcoin (FARTCOIN), and Virtuals Protocol (VIRTUAL). In notable developments, a public company recently traded $5.15 million worth of stock for a CryptoPunks JPEG. Despite Bitcoin's all-time high movements, a survey shows that 60% of Americans consider crypto investments too risky. Meanwhile, Ethereum and XRP prices have dropped while Bitcoin remains steady.

data.title: Fintech, cryptocurrency organizations call on Trump to safeguard open banking amid bank resistance, impacting access to wallets and DeFi apps.
data.description: Several crypto and financial technology organizations are calling on President Trump to advocate for the preservation of open banking regulations. They emphasize that the outcome of this issue could impact access to wallets, decentralized finance applications, and stablecoins. The groups highlight the significance of maintaining these rules to ensure continued access to financial services in the crypto space.

data.title: Ammunition Depot in Boca Raton celebrates legal victory for Second Amendment rights after Ninth Circuit ruling.
data.description: A major win for Second Amendment rights was achieved by Ammunition Depot, a top ammunition, firearms, and tactical gear provider based in Boca Raton, Florida. The U.S. Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit recently handed down a favorable decision in their legal battle, marking a significant victory in defending the right to bear arms. The ruling is seen as a crucial development in supporting the protection of gun ownership rights across the nation.

data.title: Info-Tech Research Group report identifies top Talent Management platforms for HR in 2025, aiding talent acquisition and development.
data.description: A new Data Quadrant report by Info-Tech Research Group has unveiled the top Talent Management platforms of 2025, as rated by users. These platforms are being utilized by HR teams to enhance talent acquisition, development, and workforce management. The report provides valuable insights...

data.title: Dr. Andrew Gomes Scholarship for Veterans opens applications for U.S. military veterans in higher education programs nationwide.
data.description: The application cycle for the Dr. Andrew Gomes Scholarship for Veterans has commenced in Houston on July 24, 2025. Eligible U.S. military veterans enrolled in undergraduate programs nationwide are encouraged to apply for this significant academic opportunity. The scholarship offers support to veterans, with a considerable number of applicants expected to benefit from this initiative.

data.title: Centric Software wins Just Food Excellence Awards 3 years in a row. 5-time winner for 2025 in multiple categories.
data.description: Centric Software, a leading Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) provider in the food and beverage industry, has been honored with five Just Food awards in 2025. The awards were received for excellence in Research and Development, Mergers and Acquisitions, Innovation, Business Expansion, and Product Launches. Based in CAMPBELL, Calif., the company has been recognized multiple times for its achievements within the industry.

data.title: California oil refiners made $1.01 per gallon in gross profits in May, $1.05 in retail sales.
data.description: In July 24, 2025, it was reported that the profits per gallon for California oil refiners increased to over $1 in May, based on data from the California Energy Commission (CEC). The CEC also revealed that the gross margins of oil refiners rose from 43 cents per gallon in January.

data.title: Dr. Omar Massoud launches scholarship for undergraduate future doctors in the US; applications open for 2026 cycle.
data.description: Cleveland, 24th July 2025 - The application window for the 2026 academic cycle of the Dr. Omar Massoud Scholarship for Future Doctors has been announced. This scholarship is open to undergraduate students nationwide in the United States who are dedicated to pursuing a career in medicine. Established by...
